behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction mentions createTestAgentDB, AppenderV2, EnableSTStorage, record.SamplesV2, record.RefSample.ST, wlog.NewSegmentsReader, and specific ST values [1000..5000] and [1234..5234] used in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug (ST dropped, comes back as 0) but does not state the exact line or code change; agent must locate and add the ST field.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only verify behavior (ST values round-trip through WAL) without asserting on specific variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests write Go test files and execute `go test`, inspecting actual WAL decode behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require exact ST values [1000..5000] and [1234..5234] to be read back from WAL; a stub cannot satisfy this.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover varying ST values, different label sets, and the listed upstream tests (TestCommit_AppendV2, TestRollbackAppendV2, etc.).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named and commented with pass_to_pass/fail_to_pass labels.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands look correct (tsdb/agent, go test flags).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at the tsdb/agent package and AppenderV2 flow, which is necessary domain context, not a specific line/file pointer.
